title: Modal dropdown not scrolling issue
symptom: The dropdown in the modal does not scroll when there are many results, making it difficult to view all options.
applies_when: Using a modal with a dropdown
not_this_if: Dropdown is not in a modal
root_cause: The dropdown's container does not have a fixed height or the overflow property is not set to allow scrolling, which prevents the dropdown from displaying scrollbars when content exceeds the visible area.
fix_steps: Set a fixed height on the `wrapper-content-search` element.
Enable the `Scroll` option on the `Overflow` property.
agent_instruction: Adjust the height and overflow settings of the dropdown's wrapper element to enable scrolling.
